content:
hello, biav! ;w; I don't really know where else to put this post and all, but I'm very passionate about it so I would just like to share, regardless.

my in-game name is Kitzy! I started playing just over a month ago and I've completely fallen in love with your game and lore. I am a big fan of lovecraftian horror and mythos, and all of the care that was put into the game is apparent to me, and I appreciate it so much.

I would love to see an awakener inspired by Vulthoom by Clark Ashton Smith at some point in the future. they're one of my favorite alien entities in the genre!

I have a link to a google document where I've typed up a sample backstory, profile, appearances, and specific textual references from the short story here: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1I2Wci8VzSFPUCw2jLKA5PQ7Cf5ZJGO5pxEgx41k7G64/edit?usp=sharing

I will happily delete this post if it is unwelcome in any way. I'm not a professional artist or anything so it's mostly just me brainstorming stuff. thank you for looking. 🩷

embeds.title: Morimens OC
embeds.description: Character Concept: Persephone Basis Real-World Mythos Persephone is inspired by Vulthoom of the titular short story by Clark Ashton Smith. Like Arachne (reminiscent of Atlach-Nacha, also created by Clark Ashton Smith), Persephone uses a Greek mythological name that reflects her Mythos counterpart...

content:
就是建議靈格5變成靈格10
每升1靈格就視為升1級三圍
但是點靈格1的材料降低為10普抽
每升兩次靈格就讓這個需求的材料數量+10
10...10...20...20...30...
以此類推
升完靈格10也還是要300普抽
不減你回收的資源
我覺得這個要求沒有很難
還有這個樣子明顯比什麼20...40...60更有點的慾望吧
it seems to be a linux specific issue, according to this https://www.protondb.com/app/3052450

I do play on linux too on one of my PCs, and I also encountered this issue, but I managed to log in because I was already playing on Steam before that, and the button was still clickable even if it flashes on and off

if you needed to sign in with the quooka account though then it might be more difficult, try to complete the login process if you can since the buttons and the typing field should still be usable, they just flashes on and off really fast

沒什麼
只是讓你們看一下100普抽換1/1/1
a very crude fix to propagation caro would be just adding an on devour effect that generates some embryo fusion, let's say 80
would fix most of the antisynergy with caro awakeners
probably still not a good realm for other caro awakeners, but would not feel as bad
